text_original: overall ai gives you what you want.
text_zh: 总的来说，AI 能给你想要的东西。
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! It is truly an honor to be part of your journey and we are thrilled that our AI is giving you exactly what you want. Your support is the fuel that keeps us going! If you ever have suggestions or need help, feel free to reach us at support@fantachat.ai. Thanks for being awesome!
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！能成为您旅程中的一部分，我们深感荣幸，看到我们的 AI 能为您提供所需，我们感到非常激动。您的支持是驱动我们不断前行的动力！如果您有任何建议或需要帮助，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们。感谢您的支持，您太棒了！
